transcript.text: On 275 and 285. Also in stereo on VHF. This is National Radio 1.
Well, hello there. This is Thomas the Vance here, TV on the radio. And welcome once again to The Friday Rock Show.
Right, tonight we feature a new session from a band called Bitches Sin. They make an acceptable noise, very acceptable noise there from Cumbria.
And out of the archives from way back in 1974, a session by Eno and the Winkies.
Top of that, we've got some new releases by Rose Tattoo, Gillan, Hawkwind, Triumph, Greg Lake, After, Dark, Rossington Collins and Cozy Powell.
Some classic cuts by Free and Deep Purple and one by Genesis, the one called Twilight Alehouse that you've all asked to hear.
Not forgetting our Friday Night Connection.
But this evening, we start with this.
